tool_args.label: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS - February 2024

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.prepared_for: Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad

payload.description: Comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

warnings: entity.parent_organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent organizations are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road

payload.description: Comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

warnings: entity.parent_organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent organizations are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

tool_args.label: NJ Transit

payload.description: NJ Transit operates West of Hudson trains for Metro-North.

tool_args.label: Connecticut Department of Transportation (CDOT)
Engineer in Training Participants Graduation

payload.description: Graduation of ten Metro-North engineers and forty-four MTA C&D engineers from the Engineer, Architect & Project/Construction Management Trainee Program.

tool_args.label: OMNY Expansion to Hudson Rail Link

payload.description: MTA expanded the OMNY contactless payment system to the Hudson Rail Link, allowing users to benefit from weekly fare-capping advantage with maximum weekly expense of $34.

tool_args.label: Third Elevator at Purdy's Station

payload.description: Metro-North Railroad announced inauguration of a third elevator at Purdy's Station on the Harlem Line. Part of broader initiative including accessibility projects at Hartsdale and Scarsdale stations.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison Ridership Split Record

payload.description: LIRR reached a new high of 39% in the GCM/Penn ridership split during the PM peak, marking the first time the percentage of PM peak GCM riders surpassed that of the AM peak.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Train Shed Repairs

payload.description: Metro-North and MTA Construction & Development performing repairs to the roof of the Grand Central Terminal Train Shed. Sector 1 currently underway includes replacement of approximately 70,000 square feet of roof structure over the Upper Level, including demolition of roadway above and installation of nearly 1,600 tons of steel superstructure below-street.
payload.location: Grand Central Terminal, New York City

location_normalized.raw_text: Grand Central Terminal, New York City

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.
project.implementing_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Implementing agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Jamaica Capacity Improvements Phase 2

payload.description: Phase 2 of Jamaica Capacity Improvements project expanding capacity at Hall Interlocking next to Jamaica Station. First stage facilitates a new connection between two tracks that terminate immediately east of Jamaica Station. Includes structural, civil, and track construction to prepare for extension of two new parallel through-tracks east of Jamaica Station, connecting them to the Montauk and Main Line Branches via a new rail bridge over 150 Street.

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.
project.implementing_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Implementing agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Walk Bridge Replacement Project

payload.description: $1 billion Walk Bridge replacement project. CDOT installing underground retention system in north parking lot and doing utility work. When completed, will result in replacement of railroad bridge over Fort Point Street, realignment of Fort Point Street, replacing super structure of railroad bridge on Osbourne Avenue, replacing railroad bridge over East Avenue, replacing super structure for railroad bridge over Strawberry Hill Avenue, and improvements to East Norwalk Railroad Station.

warnings: project.lead_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Lead agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

tool_args.label: Three ADA projects funded in Bronx Metro-North capital program

payload.claim_text: An additional three ADA projects at Williams Bridge, Woodlawn and Botanic Garden in the Bronx are funded in the current Metro-North capital program.

tool_args.label: LIRR GCM ridership share in January 2024

payload.claim_text: Customers are shifting toward 34% share for trips to GCM and 66% share to Penn Station on weekdays, with higher concentration to GCM during Peak periods (37% GCM and 63% Penn). On weekends, 31% of the trips arrive at GCM and 69% arrive at Penn Station.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: Over 80% of Metro-North Westchester stations fully accessible

payload.claim_text: Over 80% of Metro-North's stations in Westchester County have achieved full accessibility.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad stations in Westchester County

tool_args.label: Over 80% Harlem Line stations fully accessible

payload.claim_text: Over 80% Harlem Line Metro-North Stations are now fully accessible.

tool_args.label: OMNY weekly fare capping on Hudson Rail Link

payload.claim_text: The fare-capping feature enables customers to enjoy unlimited rides for a maximum weekly expense of $34, mirroring the cost of an unlimited weekly MetroCard.

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.
